headline: What Could Reignite Accenture Stock From Here?
summary: While the market frets about near-term headwinds, the consulting giant is quietly deploying billions to buy its next wave of growth.

headline: After an Epic Fall, IBM Faces a Long Road Back to Relevance
summary: Big Blue had been riding high.  Not only did fewer companies buy the actual mainframe hardware, they also bought less of the high-margin software required for tasks like banking and credit-card payments.

raw.headline: After an Epic Fall, IBM Faces a Long Road Back to Relevance
raw.summary: Big Blue had been riding high.  Not only did fewer companies buy the actual mainframe hardware, they also bought less of the high-margin software required for tasks like banking and credit-card payments.

headline: Axios House D.C.: AI is reshaping America's industrial future
summary: WASHINGTON – The next phase of America's economic growth will depend on whether the U.S. can outcompete rivals in AI, energy and advanced manufacturing, policymakers and business leaders said at Axios House D.C.
